overview: A full-stack Event Bus System demonstrating publish-subscribe architecture on the Internet Computer. Users can publish typed events, subscribe to specific event types, and view real-time delivery logs showing which subscribers received each event.
features: Publish events with type, payload, and publisher name
Subscribe components to specific event types
Event dispatch algorithm routes messages to matching subscribers only
Active subscribers list with unsubscribe functionality
Event history stored in persistent canister state
Delivery logs showing status per subscriber per event
Four-page React UI: Home, Publisher, Subscriber, Event Logs
